lines.text: [tired] It's freezing down here. Nobody ever bothers heating the cargo end.
(reading, low) [quietly] Anyone... else's... hotel... got room service.
(low) [chuckles] Told him. Take it up with the spec author.
Shen. [pause] Burn prep's on. Strap in, twenty minutes.
(low) [flatly] Lot D. Seals intact. Purge nominal. No anomaly.
